reviews.comment:
No es muy linda pero tiene buena atención

(Translated by Google)
She's not very pretty, but she provides good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndWI3UDZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños desastrosos. Falta orden en la playa de carga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
Disastrous bathrooms. Lack of order at the fuel loading area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBaTd1WkFREAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños por lo general siempre sucios. El negocio con muy pocas cosas y bebidas calientes. En lo posible buscar otra alternativa.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are usually dirty. The store has very few items or hot drinks. If possible, find another alternative.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBczZlUnFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. baños muy cuidados, aire para los neumáticos!! El agua caliente 5$

(Translated by Google)
Great service. Very clean restrooms, tire inflation available! Hot water $5
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRN0tidTJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy amables y los baños están limpios. A veces se les corta la luz y no pueden atender. Tienen un lindo parquizado para descansar

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly staff and the bathrooms are clean. Sometimes the power goes out and they can't attend to guests. They have a lovely garden area to relax in.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRM09DUlhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNROEp6MF9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención , siempre dicen que no anda el posnet y no reciben débito , es la cuarta ve que hacen eso

(Translated by Google)
The service is a disaster; they always say the card reader isn't working and they don't accept debit cards. This is the fourth time they've done this.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRM3VhOGt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) There's not always fuel. The bathroom is decent.

(Original)
Nem sempre tem combustível. Banheiro razoável.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3dllyM2FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Nada para comer!! Una pobreza el shop ese. Te venden """Sandwiches""" de milanesa con pan seco sin verduras y sin ningún aderezo. La verdad no paro ahi nunca más salvo que necesite nafta.

(Translated by Google)
Nothing to eat!! That shop is awful. They sell breaded cutlet "sandwiches" with dry bread, no vegetables, and no dressing. Honestly, I'm never going back there unless I need gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnM1A2cGRnEAE
